name: Michelle Cheung
description: The oldest sister, generally considered the leader and strategist of the three. She has a cheerful, ostensibly ditzy personality. description: __Height__: 174 cm Euphemia li Britannia is Lelouch's half-sister and the Third Princess of the Britannian Imperial Family; she is the sibling Lelouch cares most about after Nunnally. She is a kindhearted and open-minded woman who despises conflict in any form. Euphemia joins her older sister Cornelia in governing Area 11, becoming the Sub-Vicereine. description: A shy 4-koma manga artist who moves into the Bunhousha Dormitory to improve her manga. As she looks much younger than she is, her appearance often becomes a reason for jokes and affection of others.

name: Kisara
description: **Height:** 158 cm A young girl who goes to a high school in Bayron City. She is actually a demon girl who is hundreds of years old. She has the ability to eat the memories of people, including Shuu.

name: Elliot Nightray
nativeName: エリオット・ナイトレイ
description: Elliot is the step-brother​ of Gilbert Nightray and Vincent Nightray. Elliot is the only remaining son of the Nightray couples and is the heir to the Nightray family. Elliot is hotheaded, outspoken and always forces his opinions on everybody else. Ada, however, thinks he is a nice and dependable person deep down. He first meets Oz in the Latowidge library where they get into a fight over a character in the novel series "Holy Knight" (Elliot spoils the ending for Oz's favorite character, Edgar).
